hde68ff48gb14dg4d85g993cg0571bdd6be55: *You look over the box. Strange, ornate - and precious.*
h8e51cc16g96acg4b5cgabffgab41486b8f51: *You have to protect it. You have to get it to Baldur's Gate. Shar is counting on you.*
h123b56bagac16g4bf2g8998gf0b0966bba42: *No openings you can see, yet you sense something inside it.*
hf42466d4g79deg4e18ga0acgc20ac3253420: Curious artefact, isn't it? Ancient, beguiling, cryptic - the ABCs of mystery.
hb581f797g9344g495bgb340gf35c06b941da: |Comments on the box's appearance/suspicion there's more to it than meets the eye|
h6fe207a9g1f8eg47bbgba51gf722894b49c0: What a pretty thing. I imagine it's dangerous - most pretty things are.
hc9e5eea3g25eeg4c70g9ea2g33b5a16a93ca: |Comments on the box's appearance/suspicion there's more to it than meets the eye|
h1161b8ccg132bg4ff2gac08g8bb34d5f8a70: |Comments on the box's appearance/suspicion there's more to it than meets the eye|
h15e8d6f0gc3c2g4884g9fc8g73ea27fa7b51: Staring at it won't provide any more answers, unfortunately. There's power to it - that's for certain.
h7c9ccdecgbf30g4e26g93e1g1d61840e291e: I've seen markings like these. Ancient githyanki inscriptions. Whatever this box, it's significant.
h4f0e6205gf74eg4b09g87b4g495dd1a5ab1a: There's something about that thing - can't keep my eyes off it.
ha0c79166ge102g4fdfg8fd1g2811aede3121: A box that simply refuses to be toyed with. Happens to the best of us.
h7f3f0c4cga2edg4b87gb607gd5f83cb993c7: |Comments on the player's failed attempt to force open the box|
hf26dd700gf1e8g435cgaceag1e5afcbe10cc: Perhaps it needs a magic word? Try 'please'. Or 'sledgehammer'.
hcb9ca1ffgebcbg4035g8bc6gc4212eae5ca0: |Comments on the player's failed attempt to force open the box|
he44a2974g7797g4398g8a4ag1300a45f17f8: |Comments on the player's failed attempt to force open the box|
he41de79eg6bf9g4ca8g914eg03ee947ae5c4: It's useless - believe me, I've tried.
h9cab6caag07eag4d5agb575gc4d96d6ee4a6: Those runes - this object must hold great power. It will not yield to our hands alone.
h06fd8d9dg14acg4b1agb891ga308c465cdbe: Something tells me it'll take more than a few twists to break that box open.
hfc6fef13g6a91g48daga7cfgb1c7dcc10dc2: Looks like that box has taken a shine to you. So unconditional, isn't it, the affection of inanimate objects?
h777b0102gb921g4417gbc6fg7312646cffd0: |Comments on how the player can't discard the Orpheus box|
h9f03d0d4ga88dg413bgb601ge0729c41fcee: Looks like your toy has other ideas. I think you're stuck with it.
h45dae5bfg4efeg40begac7cgf1bccb29ea22: |Comments on how the player can't discard the Orpheus box|
hcdda3753g52a5g4faag8132ga6645567d57a: |Comments on how the player can't discard the Orpheus box|
h55abdf0fgdac0g4e1dga7a8g1d05931f4734: There's no getting rid of it. We'll just have to keep it hidden away.
hdb6e7a52gd5d6g47bbga1ddg82501b8c2780: By Vlaakith - we may not forsake it, nor it us.
hf3bda3b3ga343g4ea2gadf2g8bb4ba82f3d7: What in the - are we stuck with the damn thing?
h1360a6eeg847eg4621g85b9g6856e0033daf: *A curious, ornate box. Its many sides are engraved with githyanki scripture.*
h59d14564g8c75g4225gafa3g4981c5be670d: *A curious, ornate box. Its many sides are engraved with indecipherable glyphs.*
